elements.text: Dust rises from the jagged lip of the Scarred Gorge. Lyra stands poised on a narrow precipice, her white robes snapping in the howling wind. She holds her steel blade perfectly level, her breathing a steady, meditative rhythm.

With an explosive burst of movement, she lunges. Her blade cleaves the air, leaving a shimmering arc of pure qi that shears a massive stone pillar cleanly in two. The severed rock slides into the abyss with a dull roar. She sheathes her weapon with a sharp, metallic click.
A shadow crawls through the lower depths. Not with the roar of a true cultivator, but the quiet, filthy hiss of venom.

She pulls a crumpled missive from her sash, her sharp eyes scanning the messy ink. The report details the local strongman's sudden, bloodless ruin—a victory secured through poison, deception, and calculated cowardice.
No direct challenge. No test of spirit. They whisper his name as if he achieved something grand. Kaelen. A parasite cloaked in the guise of a victor.
She tightens her fist around the missive. A brilliant flare of pristine white qi erupts from her palm, incinerating the parchment instantly. The ashes scatter into the wind.
Let him climb his mountain of schemes. The higher he rises, the further he will fall when he meets a true blade. I will not allow this rot to fester.
